message:
feat(cli): add offline mode and auto-update check

- Add offline utility library for network detection and cached data access
- Update search command with offline fallback when network unavailable
- Update list command with offline fallback for personal prompts
- Add auto-update check on CLI launch (runs daily in background)
- Show offline indicator when using cached data

This completes the CLI offline mode features for bead xzgq.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
